title: Retrospective improvement log
description: Append + consolidate log at .scrum/improvements.json. Records every retrospective improvement item. Writes go exclusively through scripts/scrum/append-improvement.sh (and a future consolidate-improvements.sh for 3-Sprint archival). Direct edits are blocked by pre-tool-use-scrum-state-guard.sh.

id.description: Auto-assigned sequential id. imp-NNNN with 4-digit zero-padded counter.

dec_id.description: Optional link to a PO decision record (po-decisions.json) that motivated this improvement. Used by retrospective in po_mode=agent for change_request decisions flagged ASSUMPTION: in the rationale.

last_consolidation_sprint.description: Sprint id of the last 3-Sprint consolidation pass. Null until the first consolidation runs.
